name: programacion-ts-playground
description: Interactive walkthrough and playground for learning TypeScript with object-oriented programming

walkthroughs.title: Learn TypeScript Programming
walkthroughs.description: Object-Oriented Programming from scratch with TypeScript — a 15-week guided course.

steps.title: Set up your environment
steps.description:
Every example in the course runs with the **tsx** runtime.
Open a terminal and run: ``npm install -g tsx``
[Open a Terminal](command:workbench.action.terminal.new)

media.altText: Terminal showing the command npm install -g tsx

steps.title: Learn the fundamentals
steps.description:
Week 1 — understand what a program is, design solutions step by step, and write pseudocode before touching the keyboard.
[Open Module 1: Fundamentos](command:programacion-ts.openModule?%5B%2201-fundamentos.md%22%5D)

media.altText: Diagram showing the flow from problem to algorithm to program

steps.title: Variables and expressions
steps.description:
Weeks 2-3 — declare variables, work with types and expressions, then try them live in the interactive playground.
[Open Module 2: Variables](command:programacion-ts.openModule?%5B%2202-variables-y-expresiones.md%22%5D)
[Try the Playground](command:programacion-ts.openPlayground)

steps.title: Classes and objects
steps.description:
Weeks 4-5 — model the real world with classes: encapsulation, constructors, getters and setters, and UML diagrams.
[Open Module 4: Clases y objetos](command:programacion-ts.openModule?%5B%2204-clases-y-objetos.md%22%5D)

media.altText: UML class diagram of the class Persona

steps.title: Inheritance and polymorphism
steps.description:
Weeks 8-9 — build class hierarchies with abstract classes and let polymorphism do the work.
[Open Module 6: Herencia](command:programacion-ts.openModule?%5B%2206-herencia-y-polimorfismo.md%22%5D)

media.altText: UML hierarchy showing Gerente and Vendedor extending Empleado

steps.title: Collections and arrays
steps.description:
Weeks 9-11 — manage groups of objects with dynamic lists, fixed-size arrays, and maps.
[Open Module 7: Colecciones](command:programacion-ts.openModule?%5B%2207-colecciones.md%22%5D)

media.altText: Array cells with indexes next to a list of items

steps.title: Build the capstone project
steps.description:
Weeks 12-15 — combine everything: exceptions, searching, sorting, and complete applications designed from UML to code.
[Open Module 9: Caso integrador](command:programacion-ts.openModule?%5B%2209-caso-integrador.md%22%5D)
[Open Module 11: Ejercicios](command:programacion-ts.openModule?%5B%2211-ejercicios-integradores.md%22%5D)

media.altText: Checklist of completed course concepts leading to a finished project
